Table of Contents

Interface ISpatialReference2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to additional members that control a SpatialReference.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3267D410-F5D9-11D3-9F69-00C04F6BDD7F")]
public interface ISpatialReference2 : ISpatialReference, ISpatialReferenceInfo
